author: kil0410@a2m.co.kr
description: 투찰 이력 Excel 다운로드 + 최종 추천 레포트 PDF + 통계 CSV 내보내기

steps.name: 최종 추천 레포트 PDF 출력 (TenderRecommendPage)
steps.summary: jsPDF + html2canvas multi-page A4, PDF 출력 button, printRef wrapper

steps.name: 통계 CSV 내보내기 (StatisticsPage)
steps.summary: downloadCsv utility + handleCsvDownload (overview->발주처통계, level1->공종별통계) + CSV button in header

steps.name: MANUAL.md v2.3 + 릴리즈 노트
steps.summary: v2.2->v2.3, section 7.5 Excel export, section 12.6 CSV export, release notes written
